title: kanaph #3670
definition:
1) (Niphal) to be put or thrust in or into a corner, be hidden from view, be
    cornered, be thrust aside
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) (Niphal) to be put or thrust in or into a corner, be hidden from view, be
    cornered, be thrust aside

    NASB:  to be cornered or thrust into a corner
